hero.indexDesc: A   platform dedicated to public and private schools, and educational institutions in Morocco. Centralize all your operational service requests and simplify your management.

services.sectionSubtitle: All the operational services your institution needs, gathered in a single platform.

events.title: Event Organization
events.desc: Award ceremonies, open days, conferences, school trips, year-end parties.

printing.title: Printing Services
printing.desc: Certificates, banners, signage, flyers, business cards, books, custom prints.

supplies.title: Office Supplies
supplies.desc: Stationery, ink cartridges, binders, administrative supplies, office furniture.

repair.title: Computer Repair & CCTV
repair.desc: Computer repair, surveillance camera installation, equipment maintenance.

giveaways.title: School Giveaways
giveaways.desc: Custom items: notebooks, pens, bags, uniforms, clothing in the institution's colors.

gifts.title: Gifts & School Awards
gifts.desc: Trophies, medals, cups, certificates, year-end gifts, prize packs.

printer.title: Printer Maintenance
printer.desc: Repair, maintenance, spare parts and cartridges for all types of printers.

photo.title: Photography & Documentation
photo.desc: School photos, event coverage, institutional videos, educational documentation.

wifi.title: Wi-Fi Network Repair
wifi.desc: Installation, troubleshooting and optimization of the Wi-Fi network throughout the institution.

custom.title: Request a Custom Service
custom.desc: Can't find what you're looking for? Describe your needs and we'll find you the solution.

consulting.title: Consulting
consulting.desc: School management consulting, process audits, digital transformation support.

programming.title: Programming & Development
programming.desc: Website development, mobile apps, management software, e-learning solutions and custom platforms.

steps.step1Desc: Choose the service you need and fill out a simple, quick form.
steps.step2Desc: Our team takes charge of your request and coordinates with the best providers.
steps.step3Desc: Track the progress of your request and receive your service within the agreed timeframe.

benefits.supportDesc: A dedicated account manager to accompany you at every step.
benefits.trackingDesc: Track the status of all your requests in real time from your dashboard.
benefits.costDesc: Negotiated rates thanks to our partner network and group purchasing volume.
benefits.timeDesc: No more contacting multiple suppliers. One platform for all your needs.

cta.subtitle: Join the schools that already trust us in Morocco.

form.uploadText: Drag your files here or click to browse
form.uploadHint: PDF, PNG, JPG, JPEG, GIF, WEBP (max 10MB per file)

footer.desc: The   platform that centralizes all operational services for educational institutions in Morocco.
footer.copyright: WEB DEVELOPMENT & WEB HOSTING BY Akram Zekri
